name: Lex Dot Inside Constraint Right Side
description: T:a.b — ConstraintBind binds left T; right is parsed at CALL+1=13 which doesn't include CALL (PropertyAccess at CALL=12), so '.b' does NOT attach inside the constraint. WILL_FAIL_UNTIL_FIX: semantically 'a.b' should be the bound name, but the parser cuts at CALL+1. Then Property attaches via outer loop on the whole Constraint. Expect Property(Constraint(T,a),b).
